definition: Unique market tickers observed anywhere in the metadata pull before applying the fixed date window.
Unique markets in the metadata universe that resolve inside the fixed date window.
Unique markets in the metadata universe that are binary and have an explicit Yes/No outcome.
Unique markets with both open_time and close_time present, ordered correctly, and a close_time inside the event-time analysis window.
Unique markets retained in the stratified sample.
Unique sampled markets with candle files retrieved.
Unique sampled market tickers with a matched candle within the 1-day tolerance window.
Unique sampled market tickers with a matched candle within the 6-hour tolerance window.
Unique sampled market tickers with a matched candle within the 1-hour tolerance window.
Unique sampled market tickers with a final usable candle before market close.
